other_observers: Early sighting was with Bill Maynard, Lisa Edwards, Mark Peterson, Cole Wild, Brad Steger, Saraiya Runco, John Drummond, many others. Later, I saw the bird with Kara Lewantowicz.; Found by Lacrecia Johnson. Seen by many others.
duration: off and on for an hour or more
description: small owl, with yellow eyes, brownish red streaking on the front. See photos.Behaviors: sitting in Russian olives.Call: nonePlumage: adult
